final:
module deadbeat_controller(input [3:0] current_state,  
                            input [3:0] desired_state,  
                            output reg [3:0] control_output);  

    always @* begin  
        control_output = desired_state - current_state;  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      control_output <= current_state;
    end
  end

endmodule
